title: Rhodes, South Aegean — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Rhodes is a city in South Aegean with a population of 115,490. The medieval gem of the Dodecanese with a UNESCO Old Town, ancient ruins, and stunning beaches.
